login.title: Log In
login.description: Log in to your account to access your orders, wishlist, and profile settings.

signup.title: Create Account
signup.description: Create a new account to start shopping and track your orders.

forgotPassword.description: Reset your account password using your registered email address.

resetPassword.title: Reset Password
resetPassword.description: Enter a new password for your account.
